description: Tools and techniques of the shadow trade - surveillance devices, infiltration gadgets, poisons, forgery, and covert operations.
abilities: Blink Pack
A messenger pack with a hidden switch to a shadow plane for concealing secrets. A paired amulet teleports it to your hands from anywhere.
Blueprint
A magical folio pressed against a wall traces the entire floor in shimmering ink. Rooms, hallways, doors, and windows drawn by an invisible architect.
Bounty
A price placed on someone's head. The deed may happen swiftly, drag on forever, or backfire if the target finds out and returns the favor.
Bricolage
Useful devices improvised from whatever is at hand. A tripwire alarm, a poison trap, a makeshift weapon, a periscope. Assembled in moments from nothing special.
Cloner
An amulet for eavesdropping on communication magic. Hold it against any message-transmitting spell or object to clone the signal and hear everything transmitted.
Cosmopolitan
Deep knowledge of cultures and cities lets you pass as a local anywhere. The right gestures, sayings, and customs put ordinary people at ease.
Crypto
A ring of opaque glass that pulses near inscribed text. Activated, it translates languages and decodes secrets, scrolling the translation around its band.
Disguise
A convincing disguise assembled from found objects, complete with a signature element. Ordinary people are fooled automatically. Sharper eyes may grow suspicious.
Don't you know who I am?
A fabricated identity sold with audacity. Allies pile on fantastical claims until a captive audience gathers in awe of someone who doesn't exist.
Dossier
A magic book that copies things. Press any document against its pages and a slightly imperfect duplicate appears, the ink shimmering faintly as it settles.
Feather Hook
A grappling hook that drifts upward like a balloon until it finds a ledge and latches on with a soft click. Released with a whispered command.
Listener
A small gem that absorbs nearby sounds and plays them back when squeezed. Socketed into the Cloner, it records intercepted communications directly.
Mimic
A magical pen guiding the hand to replicate any writer's style, with a stamp for forging seals. It learns handwriting from nearby documents on command.
Needful Hilt
A weapon hilt morphing into any common weapon imagined. Sword, dagger, axe. When not needed, it reverts to a pocket-sized hilt.
Needful Key
A key that senses any lock's mechanism and morphs to fit with a faint metallic whisper. It remembers every lock it has ever defeated.
Nightcrawler
Legendary skill at charming contacts and extracting intelligence. Infiltration reveals hidden truths through discovered documents: receipts, diaries, letters exposing secrets and allegiances.
Persona
A convincing alternate identity with wardrobe, credentials, and backstory. Humble enough to vanish into crowds, or ambitious enough to open restricted doors.
Poison
Common ingredients combined into a single dose. Blue for sleep. Purple for paralysis. Black for death. Colorless for patience.
Seeker
A levitating orb responding to telepathic commands. It scouts ahead and reports back a mental picture of how many creatures occupy the space and where they stand.
Shadow
A cape rendering everything but the wearer's shadow invisible. Attacking or making noise breaks the effect. The shadow still drifts across surfaces when moving.
Shadow Cutter
A bracelet stretching into a crawl-sized hoop. Pressed against a surface, it carves a matching hole, teleporting the removed material to a shadow plane.
Silver Tongue
Talking your way out of trouble when caught. Authority, ignorance, or a well-placed bribe. Misjudging the approach leaves you no better off.
Spyglasses
Enchanted eyeglasses granting perfect sight in darkness. Upgradeable over time with magnification, infrared vision through walls, and illusion detection.
Strap
Weapons concealed within clothing, invisible unless physically searched. Demands enough clothing to hide them and a calm demeanor to sell the deception.
The Artifice
A small mask projecting a flawless illusion of any remembered appearance and voice. It quietly records the likeness of every creature encountered nearby.
Tracker
A sticky magical tag the size of a bead, and a compass that points toward it. The arrow turns gold and vibrates softly when close.
